title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Reliance Industries

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Reliance Industries
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Reliance Industries:
Reliance Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
